Rllm 0.1.0
  • Reference
  • Changelog

Inspect the normalized checkpoint description of a GGUF model

Source: R/rllm_plan.R
rllm_plan.Rd

Rllm normalizes model-family metadata into a small data AST before it borrows any weight payload. The plan names tensor roles, resolved shapes, layer operators, feed-forward operators, persistent state and output projection, and carries the semantic rllm_program() derived from them. It contains data only: no R closures and no backend objects. Native execution consumes the bound program; this plan remains an inspection view of checkpoint normalization.

Usage

rllm_plan(x)

Arguments

x

An rllm_model or a path to a GGUF file.

Value

An inspectable object of class rllm_plan.

On this page
